Community Sites

Is your charity or community group looking to raise awareness for your cause? Find out more here.
Forest Lake Shopping Centre is a proud supporter of local community groups, not-for-profit organisations, sporting and music clubs, and more. 

We provide space in the Centre, free of charge, for registered not-for-profit organisations looking to raise awareness or much needed funds through donations and raffles. 

Things to consider: 

• Certificate of Not for Profit Organisation OR Authority to Fundraise
• Certificate of Currency (Public Liability Insurance) to the value of $20M
• Where applicable total prize pool to the value of $1,000

If you have answered yes to all of the above, you may be eligible for a community site! Please complete our online form below to enquire about reserving a space. 

Preferred Dates

Preference 2

Welcome Here

I agree to the privacy policy and wish to receive Forest Lake Shopping Centre's newsletter containing the latest news and offers.

 

We acknowledge and respect the traditional lands and cultures of the Jagera, Yuggera and Ugarapul peoples of Ipswich and Springfield, the Traditional Owners and Custodians of the Country on which Forest Lake Shopping Centre resides, and pay our respects to Elders past and present. We recognise Frist Nations peoples' longstanding and ongoing spiritual connections to land, sea, community, and country.
